components.name: Info Alert
components.usage: Use for helpful information or tips.

components.name: Success Alert
components.usage: Show after successful form submission or action.
components.accessibility: Use role="status" for live region announcements.

components.name: Warning Alert
components.html:
⚠️

Please review this before proceeding.
components.usage: Use for warnings or important cautions.

components.name: Error Alert
components.html:
✕

An error occurred. Please try again.

components.name: Dismissible Alert
components.html: This message can be dismissed.
components.usage: Allow users to dismiss non-critical alerts.
components.accessibility: Button has clear aria-label for screen readers.

components.name: Alert with Action
components.usage: Use when alert requires user action.

components.name: Toast Notification
components.usage: Show temporary notifications. Auto-remove after 3-4 seconds.

components.name: Callout Box
components.html:
Did You Know?

This is a highlighted section for important info.
components.usage: Use for important tips or highlights in content.
